meaning: n.(果类或谷物的)外壳(通常用复数),皮,无价值之物vt.剥...的壳,削皮
examples: The feasibility of preparation of particulate activated carbon from char of cocoa nut husk by water vapour microwave was studied.
How can we remove the husk of the grains?
They opened their pillows and consumed the corn husk filling.
The grain has no husk, unlike barley, and it has plenty of oily proteins.
To assess the ear's age, pull back the husk and taste a kernel.
